title: One day awareness camp in primary school, Gharbara Village
content: Event Date: 6th August 2022 Galgotias University's SOLE department organized a one-day awareness camp at Gharbara Village's primary school to educate students and the community on crucial issues and empower them. The event commenced with an inaugural ceremony attended by university representatives, local authorities, and educators, emphasizing education and community involvement in addressing societal challenges. Interactive sessions covered health, environmental conservation, and digital literacy, enriched by experts' insights. Practical activities like cleanliness drives and tree plantations engaged students, instilling environmental responsibility. The camp facilitated dialogue between university students and school children, bridging urban-rural divides. A poignant closing ceremony recognized participants' efforts, distributing certificates and expressing gratitude to school authorities and the community. In retrospect, the camp epitomized enlightenment and empowerment, equipping participants with skills and fostering societal responsibility. It showcased education's transformative power and the importance of community engagement in shaping a more inclusive future. Galgotias University's SOLE department organized a one-day awareness camp at the primary school in Gharbara Village. The aim of this camp was to educate the students and the community about various important issues and empower them with knowledge and skills. The camp began with an opening ceremony where representatives from Galgotias University, along with local authorities and teachers, addressed the gathering. They emphasized the importance of education and community involvement in addressing societal challenges. Throughout the day, various interactive sessions and workshops were conducted on topics such as health and hygiene, environmental conservation, and digital literacy. Experts from different fields were invited to share their insights and experiences with the participants. In addition to theoretical sessions, practical demonstrations and activities were organized to engage the students actively. They participated in cleanliness drives, tree plantation initiatives, and digital awareness programs. These activities not only provided them with hands-on learning experiences but also instilled a sense of responsibility towards their environment and society. Furthermore, the camp served as a platform for the exchange of ideas and experiences between the university students and the primary school children. This interaction facilitated mutual learning and understanding, bridging the gap between urban and rural communities. The camp commenced with an inaugural ceremony that resonated with enthusiasm and purpose. Dignitaries from Galgotias University, alongside local authorities and educators, graced the occasion with their presence. In their addresses, they underscored the pivotal role of education and community engagement in mitigating societal challenges, thereby setting the tone for the day's proceedings. Subsequently, the day unfolded into a tapestry of interactive sessions and workshops meticulously designed to impart knowledge on diverse themes. Topics ranging from health and hygiene to environmental conservation and digital literacy took center stage. Renowned experts from various fields were invited to share their insights and experiences, enriching the learning experience of the participants. Moreover, the theoretical discourse seamlessly transitioned into practical application through engaging demonstrations and activities. Students enthusiastically participated in cleanliness drives, enthusiastically planted saplings, and eagerly absorbed the nuances of digital awareness programs. These hands-on experiences not only bolstered their understanding but also instilled a profound sense of stewardship towards their surroundings. An intrinsic facet of the camp was the harmonious exchange of ideas and experiences between the university students and the impressionable minds of the primary school children. This intergenerational interaction facilitated a symbiotic learning environment, fostering mutual understanding and bridging the chasm between urban and rural communities. As the sun dipped below the horizon, signaling the culmination of a day filled with learning and camaraderie, a poignant closing ceremony ensued. Here, the tireless efforts of all participants were lauded, and certificates of participation were distributed as tokens of appreciation. Representatives from Galgotias University expressed heartfelt gratitude to the school authorities and the local community for their unwavering cooperation and support throughout the event. In retrospect, the one-day awareness camp orchestrated by Galgotias University's SOLE department proved to be a beacon of enlightenment and empowerment. It not only equipped the participants with knowledge and skills but also fostered a sense of responsibility towards societal well-being. As the echoes of the event reverberate through the corridors of time, it stands as a testament to the transformative power of education and community engagement in nurturing a brighter, more inclusive future. Department Name – SBS
